_publications._publicationTitle: Primary osteopathy of vertebrae in a neurofibromatosis type 1 murine model.

_contextSnippet: significantly reduced osteoblast number per mm of bone surface was observed in the upper facet process of Nf1 mice than in the other three genotypes of mice
details: Significantly reduced osteoblast number per mm of bone surface in upper facet process compared to other genotypes
